## `useResource`

<!-- Brief description — what it fetches and what it returns. -->

### Signature

```ts
function useResource(params: ResourceParams): UseResourceReturn
```

### Parameters

| Param | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `orgId` | `string` | Yes | <!-- description --> |

### Returns

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `data` | `Resource[]` | <!-- description --> |
| `isLoading` | `boolean` | SWR loading state |
| `error` | `Error \| undefined` | SWR error state |

### Example

```tsx
const { data: resources, isLoading } = useResource({ orgId });

if (isLoading) return <Skeleton />;
```
